name: H100 RealEval
description: QAD-MultiGuard H100 paper-validation pipeline with SFT training, persistent /workspace, Jupyter/VSCode/Ollama
readme:
# H100 RealEval Template

## One-Click Pipeline

```bash
cd /workspace
git clone https://github.com/wangdajin062/H100_package_realeval.git .
bash run_all.sh
```

## Ports
- **Jupyter Lab**: port 8888
- **VSCode**: port 3000
- **Ollama**: port 11434
- **API**: port 8000

## Environment
- PyTorch 2.8 + CUDA 12.8
- Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct (auto-downloaded)
- bitsandbytes 4-bit quantization
- LoRA SFT training with PEFT

## Storage
- `/workspace` — persistent network volume (50GB)
- `/workspace/models` — cached model weights
- `/workspace/hf_cache` — HuggingFace cache
- `/workspace/outputs` — experiment results
